title: Checkout latency spike & elevated 5xx on storefront
summary: Customers report slow or failing checkout. p99 latency on checkout-service climbed from 220ms to 9s within 8 minutes. Error rate up to 12%. No full outage; intermittent failures.
true_root_cause_hidden: Database connection pool exhaustion on checkout-service. A deploy 20 min earlier lowered pool max from 50 to 10 while a new synchronous fraud-check call held connections longer, so the pool saturated under normal traffic. Redis and the payment gateway are red herrings.

alerts.text: SLO burn rate 14x on checkout availability

deploys.change: v2.31.0: add synchronous fraud-check call before order commit; update db config (HikariCP maximumPoolSize 50 -> 10)
deploys.author: release-bot

logs.msg: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 8000ms
